provenance.disclaimer: CURATED OFFLINE SUBSET, NOT FETCHED LIVE. Each gene set below is a hand-curated, publicly-documented SUBSET of the corresponding real KEGG / Reactome / GO pathway membership — it is NOT the complete pathway and NOT a live Enrichr/g:Profiler/STRING-enrichment or GSEA query. Over-representation p-values computed against this snapshot are therefore snapshot-relative and are stamped with pathway_size + background_size + snapshot_source so they are interpretable rather than presented as genome-wide Enrichr p-values. Gene memberships were transcribed from the public pathway pages cited below; no alias/synonym expansion is performed (symbols are matched upper-cased, as-is).

sources.KEGG: https://www.genome.jp/kegg/pathway.html (KEGG PATHWAY database, hsa* human maps)
sources.Reactome: https://reactome.org (Reactome Pathway Knowledgebase, R-HSA-* stable ids)

provenance.license_note: KEGG identifiers/map names are used for reference only; Reactome is CC-BY 4.0; GO is CC-BY 4.0. Only small, well-known gene-symbol subsets are bundled here for offline over-representation analysis.

gene_sets.name: Alzheimer disease
gene_sets.description: KEGG canonical Alzheimer disease map (curated subset): APP/PSEN processing, tau, ApoE, excitotoxicity, kinase and mitochondrial arms.

gene_sets.name: Amyloid fiber formation
gene_sets.description: Reactome amyloid fiber formation (curated subset): amyloidogenic secretase substrates and aggregation-associated chaperones/carriers.

gene_sets.name: Amyloid precursor protein (APP) catabolism / secretase processing
gene_sets.description: Reactome APP catabolic processing (curated subset): alpha/beta/gamma-secretase machinery.

gene_sets.name: Tau protein phosphorylation / tau pathology
gene_sets.description: Gene Ontology tau-protein phosphorylation (curated subset): MAPT and its principal effector kinases in neurofibrillary-tangle pathology.

gene_sets.name: MAPK signaling pathway
gene_sets.description: KEGG MAPK signaling (curated subset): RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK and receptor-tyrosine-kinase inputs.

gene_sets.name: Ras signaling pathway
gene_sets.description: KEGG Ras signaling (curated subset): RAS GTPases and downstream PI3K/MAPK/PLC effectors.

gene_sets.name: Neuroinflammatory response / microglial activation
gene_sets.description: Gene Ontology neuroinflammatory response with microglial-activation AD risk genes (curated subset): TLR/NF-kB innate immunity plus AD microglial loci.

gene_sets.name: Autophagy - animal
gene_sets.description: KEGG autophagy (curated subset): mTOR/PI3K-regulated ATG core and its AD-relevant regulators.

gene_sets.name: PI3K-Akt signaling pathway
gene_sets.description: KEGG PI3K-Akt signaling (curated subset): PI3K/AKT axis with RTK inputs and survival effectors.

gene_sets.name: NMDA receptor / glutamatergic signaling (excitotoxicity)
gene_sets.description: Gene Ontology ionotropic glutamate (NMDA) receptor signaling (curated subset): NMDA subunits and calcium/kinase effectors of excitotoxicity.

gene_sets.name: Oxidative phosphorylation (mitochondrial dysfunction)
gene_sets.description: KEGG oxidative phosphorylation (curated subset): Complex I NADH-dehydrogenase subunits implicated in AD mitochondrial dysfunction.
